title: Uragoga detoniana
intro:
I couldn't find any information on Uragoga detoniana. However, I can provide information on a plant with a similar name, Uragoga uragoensis, also known as Uragoga detoniana is not found, but Uragoga uragoensis  may be a synonym for Uragoga detoniana.

 Uragoga uragoensis, a plant species native to tropical Africa, is a type of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae.

 The health benefits of Uragoga uragoensis include its potential use as an antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic agent, which may aid in treating various health conditions such as infections, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues.

 The bioactive constituents of Uragoga uragoensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

 The most common herbal preparations made with Uragoga uragoensis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which may be used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
